comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌟 How would you rate Tristan da Cunha from 0 to 10?
🌍 What fascinated you the most about this island at the edge of the world—the volcanic landscape, the extraordinary wildlife, or the resilience of the people who call it home?
📍 Where are you watching from? Share your country or city in the comments so we can see how far this journey has reached.
❤ If this documentary inspired you, please subscribe and share it with fellow explorers. Your support helps Earth Revealed continue uncovering the hidden places and remarkable stories of our planet. Thank you for traveling with us.

comments.author: @johnkenny2210
comments.text: Very interesting 🤔 documentary 👍 thanks for sharing watching 👀 from Whyalla South Australia 🇦🇺

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Hello South Australia! 🇦🇺 Thank you so much for watching all the way from Whyalla. I’m thrilled you found the documentary interesting. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more adventures! ✨🙏

comments.author: @abdelilahnassiri
comments.text: La France l'Angleterre a 😂des terres des îles hors l'Europe et vous coupé la map du Maroc de sont Sahara 😂 vraiment la justice européenne est kaka

replies.author: @abdelilahnassiri
replies.text: ​@EpicEarthYTBnon cher Monsieur la map du Maroc c'est la vie au la mort. Moi hier j'ai vu un tunesien au algérien qui méprise un homme français âgé je me suis sentie mal. J'ai vu des adolescents qui jettent de l'eau sur des femmes françaises en bicyclette je me suis sentie très mal. Moi je ne suis pas comme vous et je ne le serai jamais.jai ni suivi ni finir votre vidéo. Je préfère mourir que être comme vous. Moi je suis un chrétien marocain. Mais avant après toujours je reste un marocain

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Merci pour votre commentaire ! Je comprends tout à fait la sensibilité concernant la carte du Maroc 🇲🇦. Mon but est de partager la beauté des paysages et l'histoire, pas de prendre position politiquement. J'apprécie votre vigilance. J'espère que vous continuerez à suivre nos aventures ! 🙏✨

comments.author: @richardholman7251
comments.text: It's an interesting documentary about an extremely remote British overseas territory and I enjoyed it.  However, I'm a bit puzzled as to why they chose to use footage of what looks like New York City when mentioning that families were housed in Southampton after being evacuated from Tristan da Cunha following the volcanic eruption in the mid twentieth century.  Ditto for the shots of young people supposedly enjoying the benefits of the Starlink satellite internet connection in what actually looks like an internet cafe in a large modern city.  I know I'm being pedantic, but it's just a bit lame.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: You have an incredible eye for detail! You are absolutely right. Finding 100% accurate archival footage for specific historical moments like the 1961 evacuation can be extremely challenging, and unfortunately, an oversight occurred during the post-production phase while selecting the B-roll. I appreciate you pointing this out as it helps me be more rigorous in the future. Thank you for watching so closely and for your support! 🙏🎞️✨

comments.author: @ЕвгенийПавленко-н5ы
comments.text: Хорошее кино спасибо большое за такую работу интересно и познавательно Евгений Павленко ставропольский край❤❤❤❤❤❤🎉🎉🎉

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Большое спасибо, Евгений! Мне очень приятно получить такой теплый отзыв из Ставропольского края. Рад, что видео о Тристан-да-Кунья вам понравилось. Пожалуйста, продолжайте поддерживать канал и следите за новыми выпусками! ❤🙏✨

comments.author: @kombatechannel2649
comments.text: here in Philippines!how to become citizen that place...?

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Hello Philippines! 🇵🇭 To answer your question, becoming a resident or citizen of Tristan da Cunha is actually almost impossible. It is a very small, closed community where residency is strictly reserved for those with local family roots. Land is communal and cannot be bought by outsiders. Glad the video sparked your curiosity, though! Please stay tuned and keep supporting! ✨🙏

comments.author: @documentary-n5n
comments.text: I am 55 years old, and I am ready to go there tomorrow to escape the madness of this world... how can I buy a property there?

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: @BarnabasOkoye-x5b Respect to your 88 years and your amazing spirit! 🙏 You’re right, Tristan offers a level of peace that’s hard to find anywhere else. Sadly, those one-way tickets are hard to get since there’s no airport—only a long journey by sea! 🚢 I’m so honored that my video reached you. Please stay tuned and keep hỗ trợ the channel for more adventures! ✨❤

replies.author: @BarnabasOkoye-x5b
replies.text: At 55 you are too young to contemplate retiring to Tristan. Now how do I get one way ticket to Tristan? I am 88 years old. That’s the place for the likes of me.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I completely understand the longing to escape the noise of the modern world. 🌿 Tristan da Cunha is indeed the ultimate sanctuary of peace. However, the island has very unique laws—land is communally owned by the local families, so property is not available for sale to outsiders. I hope this video can be a small 'virtual escape' for you today. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more peaceful journeys! ✨🙏

comments.author: @ShahadaturRahmanSohel
comments.text: Very Nice. Thanks for bangla audio

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Dhanyabad! 🙏 I’m so glad you enjoyed the Bangla audio. My goal is to make these stories accessible to everyone. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more! ❤🇧🇩✨

comments.author: @alexs3119
comments.text: I am 65 and I would go there tomorrow to escape this craziness of the world.......let me die in peace......how can I buy a property overthere?

replies.author: @alexs3119
replies.text: @EpicEarthYTB I could have expected something like that.........

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I can truly understand that longing for peace and quiet; many of us feel the need to escape the noise sometimes. Tristan da Cunha is indeed the definition of tranquility. However, the island has very strict rules—land cannot be bought by outsiders, as it is communally owned by the islanders. Perhaps this video can be a small 'virtual escape' for you today. Wishing you much peace and comfort. ✨🙏

comments.author: @s.2210
comments.text: Интересно, как на острове появились машины? Приплыли на кораблях? 🤔

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Отличный вопрос! 😊 Да, вы абсолютно правы. Поскольку на острове нет аэропорта, всё — от продуктов до автомобилей — доставляется морем из Кейптауна. Это целое приключение: машины поднимают кранами с больших судов на небольшие баржи, чтобы доставить их в крошечную гавань Калшот. Путь занимает около 6-7 дней в открытом океане! 🌊🚢

comments.author: @nikukr4660
comments.text: Штучний інтект озвучує жахливо.Слухати не комфортно.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Дякую за ваш чесний відгук! 🙏 Ми розуміємо, що озвучка ШІ ще не ідеальна. Ми постійно працюємо над покращенням якості звуку та інтонацій, щоб вам було приємніше слухати. Сподіваємося на вашу підтримку та розуміння! ✨

comments.author: @Vid7872
comments.text:
Sept 2024 is when Tristan got infected with the mind virus. It's the portal that will kill off the population.
No 20 year old will stay now. It's done

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Appreciate you sharing your perspective. The challenge of retaining a younger generation is something many isolated communities face today. It remains to be seen how Tristan da Cunha will adapt to these changing times. Thanks for watching and for your support of the channel.
